mapper.select: SELECT * FROM plan_template_meal_food WHERE meal_config_id = #{mealConfigId} ORDER BY sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO plan_template_meal_food (meal_config_id, food_id, food_name, suggested_amount_g, sort_order) VALUES (#{mealConfigId}, #{foodId}, #{foodName}, #{suggestedAmountG}, #{sortOrder})

INSERT INTO plan_template_meal_food (meal_config_id, food_id, food_name, suggested_amount_g, sort_order) VALUES
(#{item.mealConfigId}, #{item.foodId}, #{item.foodName}, #{item.suggestedAmountG}, #{item.sortOrder})
